statements.athlete: I need to understand the mechanics of a movement before I can fully commit to it.
statements.coach: They need to understand the mechanics of a movement before they'll commit to it.

statements.athlete: I can overthink a lift to the point it stops feeling natural.
statements.coach: They can overthink a lift to the point it stops looking natural.

statements.athlete: If I don't understand why a session is programmed, I quietly doubt it.
statements.coach: If they don't understand why a session is programmed, they quietly doubt it.

statements.athlete: I'll keep questioning a coach's method until the reasoning convinces me.
statements.coach: They'll keep questioning a method until the reasoning convinces them.

statements.athlete: I'll train through pain I probably shouldn't.
statements.coach: They'll train through pain they probably shouldn't.

statements.athlete: Taking a rest day or a deload feels like going backwards.
statements.coach: A rest day or deload feels like going backwards to them.

statements.athlete: I perform worse in competition than I do in training.
statements.coach: They perform worse in competition than they do in training.

statements.athlete: When the pressure's on, I get stuck in my own head.
statements.coach: When the pressure's on, they get stuck in their own head.

statements.athlete: If training stops being fun, I check out fast.
statements.coach: If training stops being fun, they check out fast.

statements.athlete: I need variety or I lose interest in a programme.
statements.coach: They need variety or they lose interest in a programme.

statements.athlete: A new coach has to earn my trust before I give it.
statements.coach: A new coach has to earn their trust before they give it.

statements.athlete: I'd rather train alone and figure things out for myself.
statements.coach: They'd rather train alone and figure things out themselves.

statements.athlete: I take the blame for things that aren't entirely my fault.
statements.coach: They take the blame for things that aren't entirely their fault.

statements.athlete: I replay my own mistakes for hours afterwards.
statements.coach: They replay their own mistakes long after the session.

statements.athlete: I assume I have to work harder than everyone else just to keep up.
statements.coach: They behave as if they have to out-work everyone just to keep up.

statements.athlete: Being underestimated motivates me more than praise does.
statements.coach: Being underestimated motivates them more than praise does.

statements.athlete: If I don't agree with part of a programme, I'll quietly do my own thing.
statements.coach: If they don't agree with part of a programme, they quietly do their own thing.

statements.athlete: I've got the physical tools, but my self-belief lets me down when it counts.
statements.coach: They've got the physical tools, but their self-belief lets them down when it counts.

statements.athlete: I'd rather avoid a movement than be seen doing it badly.
statements.coach: They'd rather avoid a movement than be seen doing it badly.

statements.athlete: Accessory and general work feels like a distraction from competing.
statements.coach: Accessory and general work feels like a distraction from competing to them.

statements.athlete: I'm usually the most vocal one in the room.
statements.coach: They're usually the most vocal one in the room.

statements.athlete: I spend a lot of energy looking after how everyone else is feeling.
statements.coach: They spend a lot of energy managing how everyone else is feeling.

statements.athlete: I worry that a minor ache is the start of something serious.
statements.coach: They worry a minor ache is the start of something serious.

statements.athlete: I'll agree to a change, then mostly carry on how I wanted.
statements.coach: They'll agree to a change, then mostly carry on how they wanted.

statements.athlete: I'm still not always sure what's normal and what's a problem in training.
statements.coach: They're still unsure what's normal and what's a problem in training.

forced_pairs.prompt_athlete: Of these four, which is MOST like you — and which is LEAST?
forced_pairs.prompt_coach: Of these four, which is MOST like this athlete — and which is LEAST?

options.athlete: I push through fatigue and pain to get the work done.
options.coach: Pushes through fatigue and pain to get the work done.

options.athlete: I hold myself responsible when the group falls short.
options.coach: Holds themselves responsible when the group falls short.

options.athlete: I grind relentlessly because I assume I have to.
options.coach: Grinds relentlessly because they assume they have to.

options.athlete: I obsess over getting the details of a movement perfect.
options.coach: Obsesses over getting the details of a movement perfect.

forced_pairs.prompt_athlete: Again — which is MOST like you, and which is LEAST?
forced_pairs.prompt_coach: Again — which is MOST like them, and which is LEAST?

options.athlete: Pressure gets in my head and I tighten up.
options.coach: Pressure gets in their head and they tighten up.

options.athlete: I switch off when training gets too serious or rigid.
options.coach: Switches off when training gets too serious or rigid.

options.athlete: I keep people at arm's length until they prove themselves.
options.coach: Keeps people at arm's length until they prove themselves.

options.athlete: I protect my reputation by avoiding things I might fail at.
options.coach: Protects their reputation by avoiding things they might fail at.

forced_pairs.prompt_athlete: Last one — which is MOST like you, and which is LEAST?
forced_pairs.prompt_coach: Last one — which is MOST like them, and which is LEAST?

options.athlete: I need the reasoning before I'll buy into a plan.
options.coach: Needs the reasoning before they'll buy into a plan.

options.athlete: I bend the programme toward my own preferences.
options.coach: Bends the programme toward their own preferences.

options.athlete: I lean on my coach for almost every decision.
options.coach: Leans on you for almost every decision.

options.athlete: I resent anything that isn't directly competition prep.
options.coach: Resents anything that isn't directly competition prep.
